function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "path": "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/verification/scenarios/scenario_dma_transfer.yaml", "file_text": "scenario_name: scenario_dma_transfer
description: >
  Verifies the 8-channel DMA controller of mspm33c321a_derivative. Tests cover
  memory-to-memory transfer on channel 0, peripheral-to-memory (UART0 RX) and
  memory-to-peripheral (UART0 TX) transfers, all 8 channels concurrently,
  transfer-complete and error interrupts, and channel priority arbitration.
checklist_ids:
  - DMA-01
  - DMA-02
  - DMA-03
  - DMA-04
  - DMA-05
  - DMA-06
  - DMA-07
test_names:
  - test_dma_mem2mem
  - test_dma_uart_rx_to_mem
  - test_dma_mem_to_uart_tx
  - test_dma_8ch_concurrent
  - test_dma_done_irq
  - test_dma_error_irq
  - test_dma_priority_arb
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: uart_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart0_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart0_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none

dma_params:
  channel_count: 8
  src_base_addr: 0x20000000
  dst_base_addr: 0x20010000
  transfer_size_bytes: 256

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; initialise SRAM test buffers
  - step: 2
    action: fill_sram
    addr: 0x20000000
    size: 256
    pattern: INCREMENTING
    description: Fill source buffer with 0x00..0xFF incrementing pattern
  - step: 3
    action: apb_configure_dma_channel
    channel: 0
    mode: mem_to_mem
    src_addr: 0x20000000
    dst_addr: 0x20010000
    length: 256
    irq_enable: transfer_complete
    description: Configure DMA channel 0 for 256-byte M2M transfer
  - step: 4
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: DMAC
    register: CH0_CR
    value: EN_BIT
    description: Enable DMA channel 0
  - step: 5
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 20
    timeout_cycles: 50000
    description: Wait for DMA transfer-complete IRQ (IRQ20)
  - step: 6
    action: compare_memory
    src_addr: 0x20000000
    dst_addr: 0x20010000
    size: 256
    description: Compare source and destination buffers; verify identical
  - step: 7
    action: uart_model_send_block
    device: uart_model
    data_block: [0x10, 0x20, 0x30, 0x40, 0x50, 0x60, 0x70, 0x80]
    description: uart_model sends 8 bytes to UART0 RX; DMA receives into SRAM
  - step: 8
    action: apb_configure_dma_channel
    channel: 1
    mode: periph_to_mem
    src_periph: UART0_RX
    dst_addr: 0x20020000
    length: 8
    irq_enable: transfer_complete
    description: Configure DMA channel 1 to receive UART0 RX data into SRAM
  - step: 9
    action: apb_configure_dma_channel
    channel: 2
    mode: mem_to_periph
    src_addr: 0x20030000
    dst_periph: UART0_TX
    length: 8
    irq_enable: transfer_complete
    description: Configure DMA channel 2 to transmit SRAM data via UART0 TX
  - step: 10
    action: configure_all_8_channels
    base_src: 0x20000000
    base_dst: 0x20008000
    length_each: 32
    description: Configure all 8 DMA channels for simultaneous M2M transfers
  - step: 11
    action: enable_all_channels
    description: Simultaneously enable all 8 DMA channels
  - step: 12
    action: wait_all_done
    timeout_cycles: 500000
    description: Wait for all 8 channel transfer-complete flags
  - step: 13
    action: apb_configure_dma_channel
    channel: 3
    mode: invalid_config
    description: Configure DMA channel 3 with invalid src/dst alignment to trigger error
  - step: 14
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 20
    irq_type: error
    timeout_cycles: 10000
    description: Wait for DMA error IRQ
  - step: 15
    action: set_channel_priority
    channel_high: 7
    channel_low: 0
    description: Set channel 7 to highest priority and channel 0 to lowest
  - step: 16
    action: trigger_simultaneous_request
    channels: [0, 7]
    description: Simultaneously trigger channels 0 and 7; verify channel 7 is served first

checks:
  - id: CHK-DMA-01
    checklist_id: DMA-01
    description: 256-byte M2M transfer destination matches source exactly
    expected: Zero mismatches in buffer comparison
  - id: CHK-DMA-02
    checklist_id: DMA-02
    description: UART0 RX bytes arrive in SRAM destination buffer via DMA
    expected: SRAM at 0x20020000 contains [0x10,0x20,...,0x80]
  - id: CHK-DMA-03
    checklist_id: DMA-03
    description: SRAM data transmitted via UART0 TX through DMA; model receives correct bytes
    expected: uart_model receives all bytes in order
  - id: CHK-DMA-04
    checklist_id: DMA-04
    description: All 8 concurrent DMA transfers complete without data corruption
    expected: All 8 destination buffers match source buffers
  - id: CHK-DMA-05
    checklist_id: DMA-05
    description: Transfer-complete IRQ fires after each channel completes transfer
    expected: IRQ20 asserts; DONE flag set in DMAC status
  - id: CHK-DMA-06
    checklist_id: DMA-06
    description: DMA error IRQ fires on invalid transfer configuration
    expected: Error flag set; IRQ20 error variant asserts
  - id: CHK-DMA-07
    checklist_id: DMA-07
    description: Higher-priority channel 7 is serviced before lower-priority channel 0
    expected: Channel 7 transfer starts before channel 0 when simultaneously requested

pass_criteria:
  - All CHK-DMA checks PASS
  - No data corruption across any concurrent transfer
  - uart_model reports clean protocol during DMA-UART tests
"}
function.name: str_replace_editor

extras.new_content:
scenario_name: scenario_dma_transfer
description: >
  Verifies the 8-channel DMA controller of mspm33c321a_derivative. Tests cover
  memory-to-memory transfer on channel 0, peripheral-to-memory (UART0 RX) and
  memory-to-peripheral (UART0 TX) transfers, all 8 channels concurrently,
  transfer-complete and error interrupts, and channel priority arbitration.
checklist_ids:
  - DMA-01
  - DMA-02
  - DMA-03
  - DMA-04
  - DMA-05
  - DMA-06
  - DMA-07
test_names:
  - test_dma_mem2mem
  - test_dma_uart_rx_to_mem
  - test_dma_mem_to_uart_tx
  - test_dma_8ch_concurrent
  - test_dma_done_irq
  - test_dma_error_irq
  - test_dma_priority_arb
priority: P0
dut:
  top_module: mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss
  filelist: rtl/compute_ss/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f

clock:
  name: clk
  period_ns: 12.5

reset:
  name: reset_n
  active_low: true
  assert_cycles: 20
  deassert_cycles: 5

external_devices:
  - name: uart_model
    type: uart
    connect:
      rx_from_soc: uart0_tx
      tx_to_soc: uart0_rx
    params:
      baud_rate: 115200
      data_bits: 8
      stop_bits: 1
      parity: none

dma_params:
  channel_count: 8
  src_base_addr: 0x20000000
  dst_base_addr: 0x20010000
  transfer_size_bytes: 256

stimulus:
  - step: 1
    action: release_reset
    description: Release reset; initialise SRAM test buffers
  - step: 2
    action: fill_sram
    addr: 0x20000000
    size: 256
    pattern: INCREMENTING
    description: Fill source buffer with 0x00..0xFF incrementing pattern
  - step: 3
    action: apb_configure_dma_channel
    channel: 0
    mode: mem_to_mem
    src_addr: 0x20000000
    dst_addr: 0x20010000
    length: 256
    irq_enable: transfer_complete
    description: Configure DMA channel 0 for 256-byte M2M transfer
  - step: 4
    action: apb_write
    peripheral: DMAC
    register: CH0_CR
    value: EN_BIT
    description: Enable DMA channel 0
  - step: 5
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 20
    timeout_cycles: 50000
    description: Wait for DMA transfer-complete IRQ (IRQ20)
  - step: 6
    action: compare_memory
    src_addr: 0x20000000
    dst_addr: 0x20010000
    size: 256
    description: Compare source and destination buffers; verify identical
  - step: 7

    device: uart_model
    data_block: [0x10, 0x20, 0x30, 0x40, 0x50, 0x60, 0x70, 0x80]

  - step: 8
    action: apb_configure_dma_channel
    channel: 1
    mode: periph_to_mem
    src_periph: UART0_RX
    dst_addr: 0x20020000
    length: 8
    irq_enable: transfer_complete
    description: Configure DMA channel 1 to receive UART0 RX data into SRAM
  - step: 9
    action: apb_configure_dma_channel
    channel: 2
    mode: mem_to_periph
    src_addr: 0x20030000
    dst_periph: UART0_TX
    length: 8
    irq_enable: transfer_complete
    description: Configure DMA channel 2 to transmit SRAM data via UART0 TX
  - step: 10
    action: configure_all_8_channels
    base_src: 0x20000000
    base_dst: 0x20008000
    length_each: 32
    description: Configure all 8 DMA channels for simultaneous M2M transfers
  - step: 11
    action: enable_all_channels
    description: Simultaneously enable all 8 DMA channels
  - step: 12
    action: wait_all_done
    timeout_cycles: 500000
    description: Wait for all 8 channel transfer-complete flags
  - step: 13
    action: apb_configure_dma_channel
    channel: 3
    mode: invalid_config
    description: Configure DMA channel 3 with invalid src/dst alignment to trigger error
  - step: 14
    action: wait_irq
    irq_vector: 20
    irq_type: error
    timeout_cycles: 10000
    description: Wait for DMA error IRQ
  - step: 15
    action: set_channel_priority
    channel_high: 7
    channel_low: 0
    description: Set channel 7 to highest priority and channel 0 to lowest
  - step: 16
    action: trigger_simultaneous_request
    channels: [0, 7]
    description: Simultaneously trigger channels 0 and 7; verify channel 7 is served first

checks:
  - id: CHK-DMA-01
    checklist_id: DMA-01
    description: 256-byte M2M transfer destination matches source exactly
    expected: Zero mismatches in buffer comparison
  - id: CHK-DMA-02
    checklist_id: DMA-02
    description: UART0 RX bytes arrive in SRAM destination buffer via DMA
    expected: SRAM at 0x20020000 contains [0x10,0x20,...,0x80]
  - id: CHK-DMA-03
    checklist_id: DMA-03
    description: SRAM data transmitted via UART0 TX through DMA; model receives correct bytes
    expected: uart_model receives all bytes in order
  - id: CHK-DMA-04
    checklist_id: DMA-04
    description: All 8 concurrent DMA transfers complete without data corruption
    expected: All 8 destination buffers match source buffers
  - id: CHK-DMA-05
    checklist_id: DMA-05
    description: Transfer-complete IRQ fires after each channel completes transfer
    expected: IRQ20 asserts; DONE flag set in DMAC status
  - id: CHK-DMA-06
    checklist_id: DMA-06
    description: DMA error IRQ fires on invalid transfer configuration

  - id: CHK-DMA-07
